doc_title_en: Notice on Determination of Matters Related to Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of treasury stock pursuant to Articles of Incorporation based on Companies Act Article 165(2))

key_facts.reason_jp: 経営環境の変化に対応した機動的資本政策の遂行

summary_en: 2,100,000 shares (1.56% of issued shares outstanding), ¥10.5B upper limit, execution window May 18, 2026 – March 31, 2027, method not specified. Reason: flexible capital management in response to changes in operating environment.
summary_jp: 210万株（発行済株式比1.56%）、105億円上限、2026年5月18日～2027年3月31日に取得予定。理由：経営環境変化への機動的資本政策対応。
